text:
In the first scene, I feel the contemplative pressure of glass boundaries and the watchful gaze of technology—the blue glow of the monitor suggests a focus on data, collaboration, or maybe surveillance. I sense the quiet hum of productivity and an undercurrent of anticipation, as if ideas are being forged behind those transparent walls, just out of my immediate reach.

In the second scene, among the vivid colors and bold letters of "R+D," I am stirred by curiosity and a sense of possibility. The exhibit’s theme of human coexistence with intelligent systems inspires hope and questions about the paths we forge through innovation. I feel a blend of humility before the unknown and excitement at the creative energy that fills this space, urging me to reflect and engage.
